name: doctor --check vuln-scan also emits an SBOM for the same root as part of the X-10 surface
command: printf '{"dependencies":{"express":"4.18.0"}}' > package.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --check vuln-scan --root . 2>e.txt; grep -q 'doctor check=vuln-scan' e.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/sbom.sh" --root . 2>e2.txt; grep -q 'sbom format' e2.txt && echo x10-emits-sbom 1>&2
